TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Danny_Ainge, title = Danny_Ainge, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Danny_Ainge} }

S.FORM: == Danny Ainge == Danny Ainge sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1976, byacing te 9 ru 25 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Oregon, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 193 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 79 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1981 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Boston Celtics. qnxan nya Michelle ga, kneril ni Danny Ainge. Danny Ainge ru bes nya, maki tau' laqi nya (Ashlee, Austin, Tanner, Taylor, Cooper ru Crew). qutux cinngasal maki Massachusetts na Wellesley . Austin Ainge ga Boston Celtics na unro squilq( pklahang zyaw na squilq人事主管), maki BYU tkura mari, tnaq yaba nya. Tanner Ainge ga 猶他州縣, semong squilq, (mtbaziy na squilq商人) ru psmsum zyaw na holi律師. Ainge ru cinngasal snhi na Yesu Kiristo cyorokya, krryax musa kyokya, Ainge praw (sukyo主教). maki 2009 kawas ru 2019 kawas, Ainge wal nbu yaba' yuhuw la. Ainge na laqi nya qsuyan mlikuy mu (Erik Ainge) mqwas beh Tennessee pqwasan biru. praw mari kalam 四分衛. 2008 kawas lga, sangka NFL Draft, te magal (ginnyagan)選中 maki New York. laqi nya qsuyan mlikuy (Jake Toolson) hiya mqwas beh 楊百翰 krahu' pqwasan biru galan nha psd' tesuru, hiya ru Utah Jazz bỉru na pinkyalan na Exhibit-10. qnxan na pqwasan biru Ainge htgan ru mrkyas beh Eugene Oregon . maki Eugene 高中 pqwasan biru na spiyang llamu nqu pslokah hi 明星.hiya rasuw Highlanders' tkura mari hlahuy maki 1976–1977 kawas wal magal AAA洲 te qutux, maki sazing kawas qani ga, wal magal kwara 洲 te qutux ru pbaq balay kmkah mari hlahuy. maki krahu' pqwasan biru lga, tmwang 1977 kawas Parade High School kwara Amerika hlahuy ru qutux uzi ga tmwang kwara Amerika te qutux na punro squilq maki mari kalam, tkura ru tmucing mari. Ainge mzyu tkura mari maki Provo, Utah na Brigham Young University(BYU楊百翰大學)krahu' pqwasan biru.1981 kawas NCAA pspung mzyu blaq balay. maki krahu' pqwasan biru 大四, wal magal Eastman,Award ru John.R Wooden sqabu, hiya ga kwara qalang krahu' pqwasan biru blaq balay na punro squilq. maki BYU payat kawas qnxan na pincyogun,Ainge wal magal blaq punro na squilq,sazing tmwang te qutux hlahuy Academic kwara Amerika.qutux kawas WAC blaq punro na squilq ru tmwang payat WAC. masoq krahu' pqwasan biru na qnxan lga, wal magal qutux kbhul mopuw sazing na pspung,wal nya slaquh qu trang NCAA . qnxan na tmucing mari kawas 1977,Ainge tmwang 多倫多藍鳥隊( Toronto Blue Jays ) maki tmucing mari na pincyogun.1979 kawas maki krahu' pqwasan biru Blue Jays tmwang 大聯盟. cyugal kawas maki Blue Jays,suruw lga, hiya tmwang tkura mari na qyanux,1981 kawas NBA Boston Celtics ginnyagan. qnxan na NBA mari( NBA 生涯) taring,Ainge ini mqoyat maki NBA pspung,Drive: The Story of My Life,te qutux mqbaq ini balq "shooting 0–2547" .1984-1986 kawas wal magal NBA te qutux( Celtics hlahuy凱爾特人隊). kinmuci' na pintzyuwaw niya' ini'ga kirok champion NBA (1984, 1986) mspung na hayhyuw na NBA (1988) pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

== Danny Ainge == Danny Ainge sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1976, byacing te 9 ru 25 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Oregon, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 193 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 79 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1981 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Boston Celtics. qnxan nya Michelle ga, kneril ni Danny Ainge. Danny Ainge ru bes nya, maki tau' laqi nya (Ashlee, Austin, Tanner, Taylor, Cooper ru Crew). qutux cinngasal maki Massachusetts na Wellesley . Austin Ainge ga Boston Celtics na unro squilq( pklahang zyaw na squilq人事主管), maki BYU tkura mari, tnaq yaba nya. Tanner Ainge ga 猶他州縣, semong squilq, (mtbaziy na squilq商人) ru psmsum zyaw na holi律師. Ainge ru cinngasal snhi na Yesu Kiristo cyorokya, krryax musa kyokya, Ainge praw (sukyo主教). maki 2009 kawas ru 2019 kawas, Ainge wal nbu yaba' yuhuw la. Ainge na laqi nya qsuyan mlikuy mu (Erik Ainge) mqwas beh Tennessee pqwasan biru. praw mari kalam 四分衛. 2008 kawas lga, sangka NFL Draft, te magal (ginnyagan)選中 maki New York. laqi nya qsuyan mlikuy (Jake Toolson) hiya mqwas beh 楊百翰 krahu' pqwasan biru galan nha psd' tesuru, hiya ru Utah Jazz bỉru na pinkyalan na Exhibit-10. qnxan na pqwasan biru Ainge htgan ru mrkyas beh Eugene Oregon . maki Eugene 高中 pqwasan biru na spiyang llamu nqu pslokah hi 明星.hiya rasuw Highlanders' tkura mari hlahuy maki 1976–1977 kawas wal magal AAA洲 te qutux, maki sazing kawas qani ga, wal magal kwara 洲 te qutux ru pbaq balay kmkah mari hlahuy. maki krahu' pqwasan biru lga, tmwang 1977 kawas Parade High School kwara Amerika hlahuy ru qutux uzi ga tmwang kwara Amerika te qutux na punro squilq maki mari kalam, tkura ru tmucing mari. Ainge mzyu tkura mari maki Provo, Utah na Brigham Young University(BYU楊百翰大學)krahu' pqwasan biru.1981 kawas NCAA pspung mzyu blaq balay. maki krahu' pqwasan biru 大四, wal magal Eastman,Award ru John.R Wooden sqabu, hiya ga kwara qalang krahu' pqwasan biru blaq balay na punro squilq. maki BYU payat kawas qnxan na pincyogun,Ainge wal magal blaq punro na squilq,sazing tmwang te qutux hlahuy Academic kwara Amerika.qutux kawas WAC blaq punro na squilq ru tmwang payat WAC. masoq krahu' pqwasan biru na qnxan lga, wal magal qutux kbhul mopuw sazing na pspung,wal nya slaquh qu trang NCAA . qnxan na tmucing mari kawas 1977,Ainge tmwang 多倫多藍鳥隊( Toronto Blue Jays ) maki tmucing mari na pincyogun.1979 kawas maki krahu' pqwasan biru Blue Jays tmwang 大聯盟. cyugal kawas maki Blue Jays,suruw lga, hiya tmwang tkura mari na qyanux,1981 kawas NBA Boston Celtics ginnyagan. qnxan na NBA mari( NBA 生涯) taring,Ainge ini mqoyat maki NBA pspung,Drive: The Story of My Life,te qutux mqbaq ini balq "shooting 0–2547" .1984-1986 kawas wal magal NBA te qutux( Celtics hlahuy凱爾特人隊). kinmuci' na pintzyuwaw niya' ini'ga kirok champion NBA (1984, 1986) mspung na hayhyuw na NBA (1988) pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == *annj aiŋe == *annj aiŋe s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa oreɣon, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu βos~ɕton ʦ~ʨeltiʦ~ʨs~ɕ. qnxan nja miʦ~ʨħelle ɣa, kneril ni *annj aiŋe. *annj aiŋe ru βes~ɕ nja, maki tauʔ laqi nja (as~ɕħlee, aus~ɕtin, tanner, tajlor, ʦ~ʨooper ru ʦ~ʨrew). qutux ʦ~ʨinŋas~ɕal maki mas~ɕs~ɕaʦ~ʨħus~ɕetts~ɕ na welles~ɕlej . aus~ɕtin aiŋe ɣa βos~ɕton ʦ~ʨeltiʦ~ʨs~ɕ na unro s~ɕquilq( pklaħaŋ zjaw na s~ɕquilq****), maki βju tkura mari, tnaq jaβa nja. tanner aiŋe ɣa ****, s~ɕemoŋ s~ɕquilq, (mtβazij na s~ɕquilq**) ru ps~ɕms~ɕum zjaw na ħoli**. aiŋe ru ʦ~ʨinŋas~ɕal s~ɕnħi na jes~ɕu kiris~ɕto ʦ~ʨjorokja, krrjax mus~ɕa kjokja, aiŋe praw (s~ɕukjo**). maki **** kawas~ɕ ru **** kawas~ɕ, aiŋe wal nβu jaβaʔ juħuw la. aiŋe na laqi nja qs~ɕujan mlikuj mu (erik aiŋe) mqwas~ɕ βeħ tennes~ɕs~ɕee pqwas~ɕan βiru. praw mari kalam ***. **** kawas~ɕ lɣa, s~ɕaŋka n*l *ra*t, te maɣal (ɣinnjaɣan)** maki new jork. laqi nja qs~ɕujan mlikuj (*ake tools~ɕon) ħija mqwas~ɕ βeħ *** kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru ɣalan nħa ps~ɕ*ʔ tes~ɕuru, ħija ru utaħ *azz β*ru na pinkjalan na exħiβit-**. qnxan na pqwas~ɕan βiru aiŋe ħtɣan ru mrkjas~ɕ βeħ euɣene oreɣon . maki euɣene ** pqwas~ɕan βiru na s~ɕpijaŋ llamu nqu ps~ɕlokaħ ħi **.ħija ras~ɕuw ħiɣħlan*ers~ɕʔ tkura mari ħlaħuj maki ********* kawas~ɕ wal maɣal aaa* te qutux, maki s~ɕaziŋ kawas~ɕ qani ɣa, wal maɣal kwara * te qutux ru pβaq βalaj kmkaħ mari ħlaħuj. maki kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru lɣa, tmwaŋ **** kawas~ɕ para*e ħiɣħ s~ɕʦ~ʨħool kwara amerika ħlaħuj ru qutux uzi ɣa tmwaŋ kwara amerika te qutux na punro s~ɕquilq maki mari kalam, tkura ru tmuʦ~ʨiŋ mari. aiŋe mzju tkura mari maki pro*o, utaħ na βriɣħam jouŋ uni*ers~ɕitj(βju*****)kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru.**** kawas~ɕ nʦ~ʨaa ps~ɕpuŋ mzju βlaq βalaj. maki kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru **, wal maɣal eas~ɕtman,awar* ru *oħn.r woo*en s~ɕqaβu, ħija ɣa kwara qalaŋ kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru βlaq βalaj na punro s~ɕquilq. maki βju pajat kawas~ɕ qnxan na pinʦ~ʨjoɣun,aiŋe wal maɣal βlaq punro na s~ɕquilq,s~ɕaziŋ tmwaŋ te qutux ħlaħuj aʦ~ʨa*emiʦ~ʨ kwara amerika.qutux kawas~ɕ waʦ~ʨ βlaq punro na s~ɕquilq ru tmwaŋ pajat waʦ~ʨ. mas~ɕoq kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru na qnxan lɣa, wal maɣal qutux kβħul mopuw s~ɕaziŋ na ps~ɕpuŋ,wal nja s~ɕlaquħ qu traŋ nʦ~ʨaa . qnxan na tmuʦ~ʨiŋ mari kawas~ɕ ****,aiŋe tmwaŋ ******( toronto βlue *ajs~ɕ ) maki tmuʦ~ʨiŋ mari na pinʦ~ʨjoɣun.**** kawas~ɕ maki kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru βlue *ajs~ɕ tmwaŋ ***. ʦ~ʨjuɣal kawas~ɕ maki βlue *ajs~ɕ,s~ɕuruw lɣa, ħija tmwaŋ tkura mari na qjanux,**** kawas~ɕ nβa βos~ɕton ʦ~ʨeltiʦ~ʨs~ɕ ɣinnjaɣan. qnxan na nβa mari( nβa **) tariŋ,aiŋe ini mqojat maki nβa ps~ɕpuŋ,*ri*e: tħe s~ɕtorj o* mj li*e,te qutux mqβaq ini βalq "s~ɕħootiŋ ******" .****-**** kawas~ɕ wal maɣal nβa te qutux( ʦ~ʨeltiʦ~ʨs~ɕ ħlaħuj*****). kinmuʦ~ʨiʔ na pintzjuwaw nijaʔ iniʔɣa kirok ʦ~ʨħampion nβa (****, ****) ms~ɕpuŋ na ħajħjuw na nβa (****) pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
